title: Boat Rental in Tioman Island: Costs, Tips & Itineraries for 2026
html:
Exploring Tioman Island by boat is the best way to discover its hidden coves and coral reefs, with charters starting from 50 OMR for a shared tour and rising to 600 OMR for a crewed yacht. Whether you depart from Kampung Tekek or Mukut, BoatHire24 helps you compare verified listings and hire a boat that suits your group and budget.

Where to set off in Tioman Island

Your boating adventure can start from several real harbours and bays around the island. Kampung Tekek is the main jetty with the most charter options, while Mukut village offers a quieter departure point for southern reefs. Other popular launch sites include Salang Bay for its vibrant snorkelling, Juara Bay on the east coast for surf and seclusion, and the small jetty at Genting Village. For a longer expedition, you can set sail from Mersing on the mainland, though most boat rentals begin right on Tioman itself.

Which boat to rent

  1. Small motorboat, ideal for couples or small families exploring nearby bays; 4, 6 guests; from 80 OMR half-day.
  2. Sampan-style longtail, perfect for snorkelling trips to coral gardens; 4 guests; from 50 OMR per tour.
  3. Catamaran, stable and spacious for day charters to Pulau Tulai; 8, 12 guests; from 200 OMR full-day.
  4. Motor yacht, luxury option like the Princess F70 for hire; up to 12 guests with cabin; from 500 OMR full-day.
  5. Crewed sailing yacht, for overnight expeditions to Berhala Island; 6 guests; from 400 OMR per day.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Tioman Island?

Rental prices vary from 50 OMR for a shared tour to 600 OMR for a private crewed yacht. Here is a breakdown of typical costs:

  • Shared snorkelling tour: 50, 70 OMR per person, including guide and mask.
  • Small motorboat half-day: 80, 120 OMR, suitable for 4, 6 guests.
  • Catamaran full-day: 200, 350 OMR, for up to 12 guests with lunch included.
  • Crewed yacht full-day: 400, 600 OMR, with skipper and crew for up to 10 guests.

For the best deals, use the boat search on BoatHire24 to compare prices across different operators and dates.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Tioman Island?

No, a licence is not required for rental with a skipper, but self-drive may require a valid licence. In Malaysia, a local pleasure craft licence is generally needed for bareboat charter, though the operator will confirm exact requirements. The high season runs from May to September, when the southwest monsoon brings calm seas and the prevailing wind is the southwesterly.

The best snorkelling is around Coral Island (Pulau Tulai), a 20-minute boat ride from Kampung Tekek, where you can spot turtles and blacktip reef sharks.

At a glance

  • Price band: 50, 600 OMR per day
  • Peak months: May to September
  • Typical trip length: half-day to full-day
  • Maximum guests: up to 12 on catamarans
  • Currency: OMR (Omani Rial)
  • Boat types: motorboat, sampan, catamaran, yacht

Questions about boat rental in Tioman Island

Can I rent a boat for a day trip from Tioman to Pulau Tulai?

Yes, many operators offer day charters to Pulau Tulai, which lies about 5 nautical miles north of Tekek, with snorkelling stops at reef gardens and a beach barbecue.

What is the best time of year to rent a boat in Tioman?

The best months are between May and September when the sea is calmest; the northeast monsoon from October to March can bring rough seas and cancellations.

Is it safe to rent a boat with children in Tioman Island?

Yes, most charter boats provide lifejackets and have experienced skippers, making family trips safe and enjoyable.

How far in advance should I book a boat in Tioman Island?

Booking at least a week ahead is recommended during high season; BoatHire24 makes it easy to secure your preferred vessel online.

Tioman Island is a world-class destination for boating, with clear waters and diverse marine life. Whether you want to fish, snorkel, or simply cruise, you can find the perfect boat on BoatHire24. If you own a boat in Tioman, you can rent out your boat and earn extra income while helping travellers explore this beautiful island. BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Tioman Island or list your own.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Tioman Island and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
